semantic_text:
feat(wordcloud): improve word processing and visualization stability

- Add duplicate word detection and cleanup in wordcloud visualization
- Enhance word cleaning logic with better punctuation handling
- Implement file type and size validation for uploads
- Add debug logging for word processing pipeline
- Fix memory leak by properly cleaning up wordcloud layout
- Optimize hover state handling to prevent unnecessary re-renders
req-7 task-57 done

feat(config): add production-ready configuration and monitoring system

- Introduce comprehensive production environment configuration in .env.production
- Refactor config.py to support production settings with validation
- Implement structured logging with JSON formatting for production
- Add health checks, metrics, and monitoring endpoints
- Set up middleware for request tracking, rate limiting, and security
- Create custom exception handling system for production errors

chore: prepare frontend for vercel deployment

- Add .vercel to gitignore
- Remove tsconfig.json from vercelignore
- Update next.config.ts for vercel optimization
- Add vercel deployment documentation
- Fix particles component import

refactor: improve code formatting and testing support

fix(auth): replace Field with Query for API params
refactor(database): add testing mode check for client init
refactor(leads): lazy initialize service instances
style(tasks): reformat code for consistency
test: update test fixtures and mocks
delete previous old test script

feat: initialize Next.js frontend application

- Set up basic Next.js project structure with app router
- Added essential configuration files (next.config, eslint, postcss)
- Implemented root layout with Geist fonts and dark mode support
- Created homepage with Next.js starter template content
- Added required assets (icons, logos) and global styles
- Configured package.json with necessary dependencies

refactor(core): improve type hints and error handling consistency

- Update type hints across core modules for better static analysis
- Standardize Optional and Dict/List type annotations
- Enhance error handling with more specific types
- Fix CORS origins variable naming in main.py
- Correct test imports and type annotations

feat(analytics): enhance word cloud dashboard with cleaned text and animations

- Add cleaned_text, total_words, and unique_words to word cloud data type
- Improve analytics dashboard layout with max-width constraints
- Replace AnimatedList with motion animations for word rankings
- Add LanguageCard component for better language display
- Display cleaned text instead of original text sample
req-7 task-60 done

feat(analytics): add comprehensive analytics dashboard with interactive components

- Introduce new analytics dashboard component with statistics cards and visualizations
- Add supporting UI components: MagicCard, NumberTicker, AnimatedList, and Badge
- Implement word frequency analysis and lexical diversity metrics
- Include sample text preview and top words ranking visualization
- Add responsive grid layout for dashboard sections
- Integrate dashboard with existing word cloud visualization

build(frontend): enhance deployment configuration and scripts

- Add new npm scripts for type checking, lint fixing, and deployment
- Configure next.config.ts with performance and security optimizations
- Add vercelignore file to exclude unnecessary files from deployment
- Create detailed deployment documentation in README-DEPLOYMENT.md

req-8 task-69 done

feat: add UI components and dependencies for animated effects

docs(layout): update page title and description to reflect app purpose

Update metadata to clearly indicate this is a WordCloud Generator application rather than the default Next.js template text
req-9 task-87 done
remove frontend project

refactor(word-cloud): simplify deduplication logic and improve performance

- Removed redundant Set tracking and Map conversion steps
- Simplified frequency accumulation logic while maintaining same functionality
- Improved performance by reducing unnecessary operations
req-7 task-61 done

req-91 task-91 done

QA Done

refactor(docker): simplify docker setup and improve health checks

- Removed multi-stage build in favor of single-stage for debugging
- Updated health check commands to use wget instead of curl
- Simplified docker-compose by removing nginx service and unused volumes
- Added debug commands to verify file structure during build
- Updated Dockerfile to use non-root user and proper permissions
